question: What is the total ticket expense of the visitors whose membership level is 1?
gold_sql: SELECT sum(t2.Total_spent) FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id WHERE t1.Level_of_membership  =  1
predicted_sql: SELECT SUM(T1.total_spent) FROM visit AS T1 JOIN visitor AS T2 ON T1.visitor_id = T2.id WHERE T2.level_of_membership = 1;
raw_response: SELECT SUM(T1.total_spent) FROM visit AS T1 JOIN visitor AS T2 ON T1.visitor_id = T2.id WHERE T2.level_of_membership = 1;
